title: Should We Build a Bybit Leveraged Intraday Crypto Trading Bot?
recommendation: Do not implement live leveraged trading. Approve only a bounded Midas/Freqtrade audit and, if clean, BTC/ETH Bybit testnet research with zero live keys/capital/leverage.
key_gates: No live Bybit keys or capital during approved scope
Week 1 Midas/Freqtrade audit only; kill if >5-10 days to testnet-ready
BTC/ETH perpetuals only if testnet proceeds
No live capital until Atlas approval=true, 30+ SP500 live trades, AUM > $25K, #215/#399/#400 resolved
OOS edge after fees/funding/slippage and long/short side validation required
Kill switch, liquidation monitor, circuit breaker, and reconciliation must be independently verified before live keys
